fab_section_md:
- Younger son of Jaehaerys I, "Baelon the Brave," the Spring Prince; he earned knighthood at sixteen and wed at eighteen (fab-heirs-of-the-dragon-15-p01:27)
- After Aemon's death he avenged him by driving the Myrmen into the sea and was named Prince of Dragonstone and heir (fab-heirs-of-the-dragon-15-p01:31)
- By his sister Alyssa he sired three sons; two, Viserys and Daemon, lived (fab-heirs-of-the-dragon-15-p01:79)
- He became the King's Hand in 99 AC and died in 101 AC of a burst belly at four-and-forty (fab-heirs-of-the-dragon-15-p01:69)
identity_line: Baelon Targaryen — Younger son of Jaehaerys I, "Baelon the Brave," the Spring Prince; he earned knighthood at sixteen and wed at eighteen.

fab_section_md:
- The Old King's most trusted friend, "companion of my labors," who served as Hand of the King for forty-one years and wrote the Unnatural History (fab-heirs-of-the-dragon-15-p01:65)
- He died peacefully in his sleep a fortnight after the 98 AC tourney (fab-heirs-of-the-dragon-15-p01:63)
identity_line: Septon Barth — The Old King's most trusted friend, "companion of my labors," who served as Hand of the King for forty-one years and wrote the Unnatural History.
